zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Courtenay於1208年出生在土耳其特拉布宗本時，她的父親Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople49歲，母親Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople33歲。她於大約1220年與Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1230年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內哈普-素-馬內享年22歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Courtenay于1208年出生在土耳其特拉布宗本时，她的父亲Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople49岁，母亲Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople33岁。她于大约1220年与Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1230年在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內哈普-素-馬內享年22岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Courtenay was born in 1208, in Of, Trabzon, Türkiye, her father, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, was 49 and her mother, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, was 33. She married Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I about 1220. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1230, in Champs-Sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 22, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Courtenay est née en 1208, à Of, Trabzon, Turquie, son père, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I environ 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1230, à Champs-Sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 22 ans, et a été enterrée à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Courtenay 1208 in Of, Trabzon, Türkei geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople 49 und ihre Mutter Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople 33. Sie hat um 1220 Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1230 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Champs-Sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Courtenay è nata il nel 1208 nel Of, Trabzon, Turchia, sua padre, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I circa 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1230, nel Champs-Sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 22 anni, e fu sepolta a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Courtenayが1208年にトルコトラブゾンオフで生まれた時，父Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinopleは49歳，母Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinopleは33歳であった。約1220年にPhilippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1230年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンチャンプス-スル-マルンで22歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Courtenay(이)가 1208년 튀르키예 트라브존 프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니 챔프스-수-마니에서 22세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Courtenay nasceu em 1208, em Of, Trabzon, Turquia, seu pai, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I aproximadamente 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1230, em Champs-Sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, com 22 anos, e foi sepultada em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Courtenay родилась в 1208 г. в местности оф, трабзон, Турция, её отцу по имени Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I около 1220 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1230 г. в местности чампс-сур-марн, сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 22 лет и была похоронена в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Courtenay nació en 1208, en Of, Trabzon, Turquía, su papá, Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I aproximadamente 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1230, en Champs-Sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 22 años, y fue sepultada en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
